zh.Brabant, Meuse, Duchy of Brabant, Holy R: 法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉-阿恭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthieu II de Lorraine於1193年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根時，他的父親Ferry II duc de Lorraine28歲，母親Agnès de Bar20歲。他於1225年8月與Catherine de Limburg在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1251年2月9日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年58歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthieu II de Lorraine于1193年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根时，他的父亲Ferry II duc de Lorraine28岁，母亲Agnès de Bar20岁。他于1225年8月与Catherine de Limburg在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1251年2月9日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年58岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Matthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthieu II de Lorraine was born in 1193, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Ferry II duc de Lorraine, was 28 and his mother, Agnès de Bar, was 20. He married Catherine de Limburg in August 1225, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 9 February 1251, in Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 58, and was buried in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthieu II de Lorraine est né en 1193, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Ferry II duc de Lorraine, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bar, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Limburg en août 1225, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 février 1251, à Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthieu II de Lorraine 1193 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ferry II duc de Lorraine 28 und seine Mutter Agnès de Bar 20. Er hat im August 1225 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich Catherine de Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1251 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthieu II de Lorraine è nato il nel 1193 nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Ferry II duc de Lorraine, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Bar, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Limburg nel agosto 1225, nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1251, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthieu II de Lorraineが1193年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンで生まれた時，父Ferry II duc de Lorraineは28歳，母Agnès de Barは20歳であった。1225年8月にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンでCatherine de Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1251年2月9日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで58歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモンセル-ルeス-ルンeヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthieu II de Lorraine(이)가 1193년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ferry II duc de Lorraine(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Bar(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1225년 8월 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 Catherine de Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1251년 2월 9일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 몬셀-e스-루e빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthieu II de Lorraine nasceu em 1193, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Ferry II duc de Lorraine, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bar, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Limburg em agosto de 1225, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1251, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthieu II de Lorraine родился в 1193 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Ferry II duc de Lorraine было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bar, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Limburg август 1225 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 февраля 1251 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности монсел-лeс-лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthieu II de Lorraine nació en 1193, en Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Ferry II duc de Lorraine, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bar, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catherine de Limburg en agosto de 1225, en Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1251, en Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
